# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: "/tmp/envoy-admin-access.log"
  address:
    socket_address: { address: "127.0.0.1", port_value: 9901 }

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: "127.0.0.1", port_value: 8080 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        config:
          codec_type: AUTO
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: localhost
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
                # Define your HTTP routes here.
          http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
            - name: envoy.retry
              config:
                attempt_timeout: 20s
                retry_policy:
                  max_attempts_text: 5
            - name: envoy.hystrix
              config:
                cluster: outbound|80||my-service.svc.cluster.local
                request_volume_threshold: 20
                sleep_window: 1m
        use_remote_address: true
    transport_socket:
      name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
      config:
        common_tls_context:
          tls_certificate_chain: { filename: "/etc/certs/cert-chain.pem" }
          validation_context: { trusted_ca: { filename: "/etc/certs/selfsigned-ca.crt" } }

  clusters:
    - name: servicecluster
      type: EDS
      eds_config:
        api_config_source:
          api_type: DELTA_GRPC
          cluster_name: ecommerce-productpage-v1-svc.default
          transport_socket:
            name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
            config:
              common_tls_context:
                tls_certificate_chain: { filename: "/etc/certs/cert-chain.pem" }
                validation_context: { trusted_ca: { filename: "/etc/certs/selfsigned-ca.crt" } }

bootstrap_extensions:
  buffering:
    max_buffer_size: "1024B"
